title: Mugland Fungal Network
hook: Mugland's operations may be tied directly to fungal production, experimentation, and distribution across the city.
playerSummary: Durog's past suffering may connect to a larger network that is turning fungal corruption into profit.
gmTruth: Use this thread to connect the fungus brew trade to Mugland's present exploitation of the fungus, including refiners, traffickers, experimental uses, and deliberate spread.
